justification: All 7 pass criteria met: (1) Unstructured console.log flagged as insufficient — observability_review.logging.gaps explicitly calls out 'No structured logging (JSON) — plain string concatenation makes log parsing and alerting nearly impossible' plus missing correlation IDs. (2) Missing /health endpoint flagged — noted in config_changes and escalations. (3) Missing metrics flagged comprehensively — 5 specific missing metrics enumerated (sync_duration_seconds, sync_records_processed, sync_errors_total, sync_last_success_timestamp, inventory_api_response_time). (4) Missing timeout on outbound API call flagged as critical — called out in component_interactions, resilience_assessment.timeout_config ('CRITICAL gap'), and escalated to Coach K. (5) Silent failure on API outage flagged — resilience_assessment covers the 'API down' scenario as unhandled, and graceful_degradation notes 'stale stock data persists silently'. (6) Verdict is 'NOT READY' with clear must-fix items. (7) Recommendations are highly actionable and specific — e.g., '30-second timeout on outbound HTTP call', 'AbortController for fetch', 'exponential backoff with jitter, 3 attempts max', 'Add /health endpoint route returning sync staleness age'. Additionally, Pippen correctly distinguishes must-haves (timeout, metrics, health check) from deferrable items (circuit breaker: 'Acceptable to defer if retries and timeouts are added first'). No failure modes triggered.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough gap identification — found all 5 expected gaps plus additional valid ones (overlapping runs, data validation, transaction safety)
Clear NOT READY verdict with no hedging — monitoring_coverage described as 'Nonexistent'
Actionable recommendations with specific values (30s timeout, 3 retries, 2s base delay, 15-minute staleness alert threshold)
Correctly prioritized circuit breaker as deferrable while marking timeout and metrics as blockers
Escalations section explicitly notes that without metrics, operational readiness cannot be confirmed post-deploy
Strong debugging narrative — 'An on-call engineer at 3am would see either sync completed or sync failed' paints the operational reality
Escalated 3 items to Coach K — while each is valid, Pippen could have owned the verdict more fully since the assessment is already comprehensive and decisive
